Flow.description: Subscriber-namespace release-test flow bound to a BlockDml kern__TriggerAction row for the SubscriberCdcProbe__ChangeEvent dispatch. Declares the change-event record and typed header inputs (so createInterview succeeds), then creates a Contact without LastName so the platform raises REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING. The unhandled fault propagates to Flow.Interview.start() as a runtime exception; on a change-event dispatch the framework degrades the configured BlockDml policy to LogAndContinue (a committed change cannot be rolled back) and emits a warning tagged errorKind=cdc-block-dml-degraded. Exercises that degrade path end-to-end across the subscriber namespace boundary.
Flow.label: TST Subscriber Flow CDC Always Fail

recordCreates.description: Creates a Contact without LastName. Platform raises REQUIRED_FIELD_MISSING at runtime; with no fault connector, the flow surfaces an unhandled fault to Flow.Interview.start().
recordCreates.name: CreateInvalidContact
recordCreates.label: Create Invalid Contact

variables.description: Change-event record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow. Required so createInterview succeeds before the deliberate runtime fault.
variables.name: record

variables.description: Typed Change Data Capture header injected by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow for a change-event dispatch. Declared so createInterview accepts the injected variable; not used before the fault.
variables.name: header

variables.description: Pre-update change-event record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow on update dispatches. Read-only.
variables.name: recordPrior
